Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: A car reservation or shared-seat booking on a specific date

passengers.description: Number of passengers in this booking

seats.description: Array of seat numbers reserved (1 to 7)

departureTime.description: Selected departure timing (e.g., '6:00 AM', '3:00 PM', '4:00 PM')

date.description: Date of journey in YYYY-MM-DD format

timestamp.description: ISO timestamp when booking was created

/bookings/{bookingId}.description: Collection containing all car rentals and daily seat bookings
